elements.title: curlew sandpiper
elements.contents: ... that the small curlew sandpiper (pictured) respects neighbour territories when chasing intruders away?

elements.title: a trilateral agreement
elements.contents: ... that after a trilateral agreement was made, Turkey designated Israel its number-one threat?

elements.title: Abdul Rahman Salama
elements.contents: ... that Abdul Rahman Salama, who currently serves as a Governor of Raqqa, used to work at a stone quarry?

elements.title: Tolkien: Man and Myth
elements.contents: ... that Tolkien: Man and Myth was described as particularly valuable for readers interested in "understand[ing] Tolkien from a religious perspective"?

elements.title: Katy Marchant
elements.contents: ... that Katy Marchant won three British National Track Championships medals within a year of taking up track cycling?

elements.title: Annamite striped rabbit
elements.contents: ... that the Annamite striped rabbit was described by scientists as a new species after it was discovered in a Laotian market?

elements.title: Thomas Kossendey
elements.contents: ... that tensions erupted between two local CDU associations after Thomas Kossendey ran as a candidate for a constituency?

elements.title: a Uruguayan-born victim of the September 11 attacks
elements.contents: ... that a Uruguayan-born victim of the September 11 attacks had founded a community in Sydney to help Uruguayans immigrating to Australia?

elements.title: a whale statue
elements.contents: ... that in October 2025, over 1,500 Alaskans protested at a whale statue?
